title: SignalOS plugin manifest (v1)
description: Concept adapted from a5c-ai/babysitter (MIT). No source code copied. Manifest shape for a SignalOS plugin tarball. Validated by cli/signalos_lib/registry.validate_manifest (stdlib-only).

name.description: Namespaced plugin id. @signalos/* reserved for the core team; community/* open; anything else refused at install time.

version.description: Semver string (major.minor.patch with optional prerelease / build metadata).

type.description: Plugin category. Determines which key must appear under entry_points.

compat.description: Compatibility constraints the host SignalOS Core must satisfy.

signalos_core.description: Semver range (subset supported: >=, <=, >, <, =, ^, ~, *, plus space-separated AND of clauses). No transitive deps.

entry_points.description: Map from a fixed key (matching the manifest's type) to a path inside the extracted tarball.

signature.description: Cosign signature metadata. Algorithm is fixed; ref is a sha256 digest over the tarball bytes.

trust_tier_default.description: Default trust tier for the plugin. The audit trail always records T3 regardless; this field is advisory until a co-signed Amendment lands.

dependencies.description: Flat dependency list. No transitive resolution; cycles refused.
